/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libopenclaw_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o libopenclaw_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/openclaw_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/openclaw_msgs/msg/detail/task_status__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/workspace/build/openclaw_msgs:/opt/ros/rolling/lib: libopenclaw_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/rolling/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/rolling/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/rolling/lib/librosidl_buffer.so /opt/ros/rolling/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
